title: Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur
tagline: Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur is a much-loved spiritual town in Tamil Nadu, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: Queen of Angels Church or St. Mary's Church is located in Kadagathur village, Dharamapuri District, Tamil Nadu, India. Due to Catholic settlements in 19th century this is second oldest church in its Dharmapuri Diocese.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kadagathur, Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: Kadagathur is a village panchayath under Dharmapuri Block and in Dharmapuri district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. This village is located 6 km away from District Capital Dharamapuri.

topPlaces.name: Selliampatti, Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: Selliampatti, also spelled as Selliyampatti, is a Grama Panchayath village located in Dharmapuri District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located ten kilometers northwest of its district capital, Dharmapuri, and thirteen kilometers south of its Thaluk capital, Palacode.

topPlaces.name: Ramakkal Lake
topPlaces.description: Ramakkal Lake, is a lake located near Dharmapuri city in Dharmapuri district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Mallikarjunar Temple, Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: Mallikarjunar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Dharmapuri in Dharmapuri district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sacred Heart Cathedral, Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: The Sacred Heart Cathedral is a Roman Catholic parish church located in the heart of Dharmapuri town, Tamil Nadu, India. Currently, a new and larger Sacred Heart Cathedral is under construction on Annasagaram Lake Road, Dharmapuri.

topPlaces.name: Dharmapuri division
topPlaces.description: Dharmapuri division is a revenue division in the Dharmapuri district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Dharmapuri taluk
topPlaces.description: Dharmapuri taluk is a taluk in the Dharmapuri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Dharmapuri.

topPlaces.name: Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: Dharmapuri is a town in the north western part of Tamil Nadu, India. It serves as the administrative headquarters of Dharmapuri district which is the first district created in Tamil Nadu after the independence of India by splitting it from then Salem district on 2 October 1965.

items.note: Kadagathur is a village panchayath under Dharmapuri Block and in Dharmapuri district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. This village is located 6 km away from District Capital Dharamapuri.

Selliampatti, also spelled as Selliyampatti, is a Grama Panchayath village located in Dharmapuri District, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located ten kilometers northwest of its district capital, Dharmapuri, and thirteen kilometers south of its Thaluk capital, Palacode.
Ramakkal Lake, is a lake located near Dharmapuri city in Dharmapuri district, Tamil Nadu.
Mallikarjunar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Dharmapuri in Dharmapuri district in Tamil Nadu, India.

The Sacred Heart Cathedral is a Roman Catholic parish church located in the heart of Dharmapuri town, Tamil Nadu, India. Currently, a new and larger Sacred Heart Cathedral is under construction on Annasagaram Lake Road, Dharmapuri.
Dharmapuri division is a revenue division in the Dharmapuri district of Tamil Nadu, India.
Dharmapuri taluk is a taluk in the Dharmapuri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Dharmapuri.

Dharmapuri is a town in the north western part of Tamil Nadu, India. It serves as the administrative headquarters of Dharmapuri district which is the first district created in Tamil Nadu after the independence of India by splitting it from then Salem district on 2 October 1965.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (123 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur?
faq.a: Stays in Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Queen of Angels Church, Kadagathur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kadagathur, Dharmapuri, Selliampatti, Dharmapuri, Ramakkal Lake, Mallikarjunar Temple, Dharmapuri, Sacred Heart Cathedral, Dharmapuri.
